productDisplayName: Nike Men Manchester United Red Jerseys
description: CompositionRed manchester united jersey made of 100% recycled polyester Dri-Fit fabric, that has black and white ribbing around the round neckline, short red sleeves, Manchester United seal appliqued on the upper left chest, swoosh logo embroidered on the upper right chest and AON print below the swoosh and the sealFittingComfortWash careMachine was coldWash separately with like coloursDo not use softenersRemove immediatelyDo not allow to lay on itself when wetDo not bleach, iron Do not dry cleanLine dryReturn to greatness with the 2010/11 Manchester United football Club Soccer jersey from nike. This jersey pays homage to the incredibly successful team with strong design details like the team colours and club badge. The Dri-FIT performance fabric ensures breathability and comfort on and off the field. This sweat-wicking Dri-FIT fabric was made from 100% recycled polyester thereby the production of this jersey has minimal environmental impact. Team this with jeans and tees for trips to the football games or for casual outings.
